orgStore.title: Banking & Payments Standards
orgStore.content: Always verify double-booking, race conditions, auth validations, response code SLAs, and database log encryption.
orgStore.explanation: Standards policy rules guide for all transaction networks.

orgStore.title: Hospitality Playbook rules
orgStore.content: Verify room availability lock race hazards, reservation state flows, checkout payment options, and tax code formulas.
orgStore.explanation: Operational playbook rules for hotel bookings systems.
